dimension_types.gate: Mechanically/structurally checkable; blocks SHIP on fail. Cross-cutting gates (C1/C2/C3/C7/C9) are backed by ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/check_blueprint.py.
dimension_types.gate_mech_partial: Structurally checkable criterion with no automated script — agent judgment applies. Labeled [gate / mech-partial] in rubric files. Blocks SHIP on fail (same as [gate]).

bands.per-family: Load only when the plan composes the matching family.

ship_rule: A plan ships when every [gate] across all loaded rubrics passes and no [review] dimension < 3. A composed plan must clear the union of all loaded rubrics' gates.
calibration_note: Status draft. First calibration pass 2026-05-30 (9 PLAN-mode dogfood samples, NOT BLIND — expected routes visible): the router discriminates by goal shape (9/9 distinct, on-shape) and check_blueprint.py accepts good blueprints and rejects the unsafe one (9/9 pass, adversarial fails). The [review] dimension scores remain UNCALIBRATED against real outcomes; treat them as directional, not authoritative. Scripted [gate] dims: C1/C2/C3/C7/C9 + verdict + substrate (check_blueprint.py). Structural-but-unscripted dims: labeled [gate / mech-partial] — C8, all per-family gates, all loop-selection and plan-quality gates. A blind re-run with numeric F1 on routing-corpus.json is required for draft-to-stable.

rubrics.name: loop-selection
rubrics.key_question: Was the right loop chosen for this goal, vs a fancier/wrong mechanism?

rubrics.name: loop-control
rubrics.key_question: Is the loop bounded, gated, contextually sound, observable, durable, and trust-bounded?

rubrics.name: plan-quality
rubrics.key_question: Is the emitted blueprint complete, concrete, and executable?

rubrics.name: ralph-loop
rubrics.key_question: Does the brute-force loop converge to working code, not slop?

rubrics.name: auto-research
rubrics.key_question: Is the research fan-out independent, bounded, compressed, and cited?

rubrics.name: orchestrator-workers
rubrics.key_question: Is delegation independent, correctly-dispatched, gated, and halting?

rubrics.name: evaluator-optimizer
rubrics.key_question: Is the generate-critique-revise gate trustworthy and bounded?

rubrics.name: debate-ensemble
rubrics.key_question: Does diversity-via-ensemble beat a single strong pass here?

rubrics.name: self-improving
rubrics.key_question: Does capability compound across runs without drift or reward hacking?

rubrics.name: plan-execute
rubrics.key_question: Is the plan/spec a sound contract, gated and drift-controlled?

selection._comment: Decomposition step: always load band=cross-cutting; then for each mechanism the plan composes, load the per-family rubric whose selectors match; expand dependencies transitively.
